scene_input.scene_summary: The Prophet Muhammad greets the Khawlān Delegation with a warm smile.
scene_input.key_visual_action: Prophet Muhammad extends his right hand for a handshake

schema_output.scene_title: Warm Greeting at the City Gate
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 367

characters.name: Prophet Muhammad
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades

characters.name: Khawlān Delegation
characters.appearance: diverse group of men with varying builds and clothing

schema_output.narrative_text: The Prophet Muhammad greeted the Khawlān Delegation with a warm smile, extending his right hand for a handshake. This kind gesture made the visitors feel welcome and at ease.

compliance.notes: Historically accurate depiction of the Prophet Muhammad and the Khawlān Delegation.

schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. Exterior of the Madinah City Gate in the warm golden light of late afternoon. The sun casts long shadows across the packed-earth road, where a group of men from the Khawlān Delegation walk towards the gate, dressed in a variety of traditional clothing including white, beige, and brown thobes with woolen cloaks. In the center of the scene, the central figure seen entirely from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, extending his right hand in a warm gesture of welcome. Soft warm golden light, inviting and friendly mood. Medium shot at eye level. Earthy, golden, and beige palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
